purpose: Improve the formerly sparse proxy-metric derivation page by adding a real-render companion for paired-render, PSNR, SSIM, and feature-similarity equations, with an exposition-only AI proxy-metric lens slot.
claim_boundary: The AI-generated proxy-metric lens slot is exposition only. Registered original/noMDL render pairs carry the evidence-bearing content; the companion is not a new metric, model prediction, task result, or benchmark row.

ai_generated_slot.rationale: The accepted slot is abstract and schematic, with no realistic scene, no material showcase, no local path, no author name, no watermark, and no red-material fallback.

rejected_ai_candidates.rationale: The first imagegen candidate contained realistic object and scene-like imagery, which could be confused with evidence-bearing renders rather than an exposition-only schematic.

standalone_figure.rationale: The final deterministic composition uses two registered render-pair cards plus a separated AI schematic card. Labels do not overlap, bullets are visible, and the active density passes the layout test threshold.

rendered_pdf_pages.rationale: The formerly pure-formula page now includes the proxy-metric companion at the bottom while keeping the derivation text readable.
The following grounding derivation companion remains on-page and readable after the proxy companion was moved back to page 12.
The navigation derivation media companion remains correctly framed; the small red fraction corresponds to route markers in existing navigation evidence, not MDL fallback material.

positive_patterns_present: AI-generated proxy-metric schematic used only for exposition
not a new metric, model prediction, or task result
negative_patterns_absent: Red material in these diagnostic cases
